name: iot-dc3
desc: IoT DC3 is a fully open-source, distributed industrial IoT platform built on Spring Cloud and evolving for AI scenarios. It enables rapid IoT project developme…
descFull: IoT DC3 is a fully open-source, distributed industrial IoT platform built on Spring Cloud and evolving for AI scenarios. It enables rapid IoT project development and connected-device management as a complete IoT system solution.
